caption: A man with a tall, spiked, silver-colored hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a red bowtie. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs. To his side, a white garment hangs on a mannequin. The man maintains a relatively still posture with his arms crossed, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he appears to be speaking, with his mouth opening and closing across the sequence. Two identical red and white logos are visible on the screen: one on the left says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another on the right says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". The background remains static throughout the clip, while the man's subtle head movements and lip synchronicity indicate he is mid-conversation.
